scenes.narration: Merit week is coming. ShiftWorksHR catches below-minimum pay and manager inversions before your leadership review.
Upload your Workday, UKG, or ADP export. Columns are detected automatically. No template required.
In under thirty seconds you get cycle readiness, merit scenario math for finance, and a prioritized review queue.
Drill into below-minimum employees, compression, and manager inversions — the same view your comp team uses after upload.
Export a leadership-ready PDF with merit scenario, risk level, and key findings — ready for the exec deck.
Try free with your file at shiftworkshr.com. No credit card required.
